message:
test(pt-core): expand no-mock coverage for enforcer and supervisor

enforcer.rs: +35 tests (34→69) covering ViolationKind serde, PolicyCheckResult/
PolicyViolation serde, CriticalFilesSummary, EnforcerError display, regex patterns,
robot mode gates (known signature, exclude/allow categories, hard critical files),
data loss gates (deleted CWD, hard critical files, soft context), protected group,
force review in robot mode, glob question mark, literal case-sensitive, utility
methods (requires_confirmation, kill count, record_kill, should_reload).

supervisor.rs: +36 tests (17→53) covering SupervisorType serde all 10 variants,
SupervisorCommand serde, SupervisorActionError display all 8 variants,
SupervisorPlanAction/Parameters serde roundtrip, build commands for containerd,
supervisord, podman, forever, nodemon, unknown supervisor error, systemd
restart/kill/delete, docker kill/delete, pm2 stop/kill/delete, launchd delete,
From<AppSupervisorType> remaining, Default trait, config custom, additional
protected patterns, unit_identifier fallback.

(process_triage-aii.7)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
